items.question: Does DahNAY handle just-in-time automotive shipments?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY runs just-in-time automotive logistics with synchronised inbound and outbound flows, time-critical air or road movements, and dedicated coordination with OEM production schedules. We support manufacturers across India, the UAE, and key Asian markets, with real-time shipment visibility from origin to plant.

items.question: Can DahNAY manage EV and battery logistics?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY handles electric vehicle and lithium-ion battery shipments under IATA dangerous-goods protocols for air freight and IMDG protocols for sea freight. Certified handlers manage segregated storage, fire-safe containers, and full export documentation, supporting EV and component movements across India, the UAE, and global markets.

items.question: Where does DahNAY ship automotive cargo?
items.answer: DahNAY moves automotive cargo across India, the UAE, the USA, Southeast Asia, and major African and European markets, leveraging 47 offices in 19+ countries. We handle inbound parts, finished vehicles, accessories, and tyres on sea, air, and road, with port operations through Chennai, Mumbai, and Dubai.

items.question: Does DahNAY handle finished vehicles as well as components?
items.answer: DahNAY handles both automotive components and finished vehicle logistics. We manage inbound parts to assembly plants, outbound finished vehicle transport via roll-on/roll-off and dedicated containers, and accessory or tyre distribution to dealer networks, with packaging and handling protocols suited to each cargo class.

items.question: Does DahNAY handle oversized renewable energy equipment?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY moves oversized renewable energy cargo including wind turbine blades, towers, nacelles, and solar modules. We use heavy-lift trailers, route surveys, lifting equipment, and multimodal coordination across sea, road, and rail to deliver cargo from manufacturing hubs to onshore and offshore project sites.

items.question: Can DahNAY support remote renewable project sites?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY's multimodal coordination enables access to remote renewable project sites including inland wind farms and solar installations. We manage permits, route engineering for narrow or unpaved roads, and last-mile delivery to project locations across India, the UAE, and key emerging markets.

items.question: Does DahNAY handle both solar and wind cargo?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY supports both solar and wind logistics. We move solar modules, inverters, and mounting structures by sea container and road, and handle wind turbine blades, hubs, and gearbox assemblies as oversized breakbulk or heavy-lift cargo with specialised trailers and engineered loading plans.

We synchronise movement with installation schedules to avoid downtime and demurrage costs.

items.answer: Yes, DahNAY's load planning maximises container utilisation for white goods using cubic-volume optimisation, mixed-SKU loading, and damage-prevention bracing. items.question: Does DahNAY handle temperature-sensitive food cargo?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY runs end-to-end cold chain logistics for food and perishable cargo. We use refrigerated containers (reefers), temperature monitoring, climate-controlled warehousing, and continuous data logging to maintain product safety from farm to destination across domestic and export movements.

items.question: Can DahNAY manage bulk agricultural exports?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY handles bulk agricultural exports including grains, pulses, spices, oilseeds, and processed agro commodities. We coordinate farm-to-port logistics, fumigation, port handling, and ocean freight to global buyer markets, supporting major export hubs across India and Southeast Asia.

items.question: Does DahNAY ensure food safety compliance?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY's food logistics operations follow hygiene and safety protocols aligned with FSSAI standards in India, FDA requirements for US imports, and international food safety frameworks. We maintain temperature integrity, contamination-free handling, segregated storage, and full traceability documentation across cold-chain and dry-food shipments.

items.question: What packaging and handling standards does DahNAY use for food cargo?
items.answer: DahNAY uses food-grade packaging, contamination-free handling, and segregated storage to maintain product integrity through transit. Our protocols cover allergen separation, cross-contamination prevention, sealed reefer containers for perishables, and dedicated handling for organic and certified cargo to meet retailer and importer specifications.

items.question: Does DahNAY support seasonal agricultural shipments?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY scales operations around seasonal harvest cycles and demand peaks, including spice harvests, fruit and vegetable export windows, and grain shipping seasons. We coordinate increased reefer container availability, port slot planning, and surge warehousing to handle volume fluctuations without delay or cargo loss.

items.question: What construction materials can DahNAY transport?
items.answer: DahNAY transports cement, aggregates, structural steel, rebar, prefabricated modules, ready-mix concrete equipment, scaffolding, and oversized construction machinery. We handle bulk and packaged shipments across domestic and international routes, with cargo-specific equipment for each material class — from bulk tipper trucks to flatbed trailers.

items.question: Can DahNAY deliver to remote or access-restricted construction sites?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY's last-mile site access solutions cover narrow urban roads, hill projects, remote infrastructure builds, and constrained-access locations. We use smaller delivery vehicles, route surveys, escort coordination for oversized cargo, and timed-window deliveries to navigate site constraints without delaying construction schedules.

items.question: Does DahNAY offer phased delivery for construction projects?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY plans phased material deliveries aligned to construction milestones — foundation, structural, finishing, and fit-out phases. Sequenced deliveries match site readiness, prevent material pile-up at small sites, reduce damage and theft, and let project managers maintain just-in-time inventory through the build cycle.

items.question: How does DahNAY handle oversized construction cargo?
items.answer: DahNAY engineers logistics for oversized construction cargo including precast modules, structural steel girders, and large prefabricated components. We provide route surveys, transport permits, hydraulic axle trailers, escort vehicles, lifting equipment coordination, and final-position placement at site to ensure safe and on-schedule delivery.

items.question: Can DahNAY manage high-volume bulk construction shipments?
items.answer: Yes, DahNAY runs large-scale bulk construction logistics with dedicated fleet capacity, recurring scheduled deliveries, and supply continuity systems. We support cement plants, aggregate quarries, and steel mills with consistent outbound flow, helping major infrastructure and real-estate projects maintain uninterrupted material supply.

items.title: Construction-Centric Planning
items.content: Logistics designed around project schedules, not just transport timelines.

items.title: Bulk Handling Expertise
items.content: Proven capability in managing high-volume and weight-intensive cargo.

items.title: Multimodal Integration
items.content: Seamless coordination across road, rail and port movement for scale and efficiency.

items.title: On-Ground Execution Control
items.content: Close coordination with site teams to ensure timely and accurate delivery.

caseStudy.title: India's Initiatives in Turning India into a Manufacturing Hub
caseStudy.content: India is shifting to become a global manufacturing hub through initiatives like Make in India, PLI schemes, infrastructure transformation, and digital logistics solutions.
